title: Palantir Technologies FY 2024 Earnings Summary
text: Palantir exceeded revenue expectations in its full year 2024 results. The company generated $2.87 billion in revenue, representing 29% growth compared to the prior year. Net income surged to $462.2 million, doubling from 2023's figures. The company's profit margin expanded to 16%, up from 9.4% the previous year. Earnings per share reached $0.20, compared to $0.098 in 2023. Revenue exceeded analyst estimates by 2.2%, while earnings per share came in as anticipated. Looking forward, analysts project the company will achieve approximately 21% annual revenue growth over the next three years, outpacing the broader software industry's expected 12% growth rate. The stock has appreciated significantly, rising 29% over the past week. Simply Wall St's analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued based on their fundamental assessment criteria, though the company's strong operational performance demonstrates solid execution.
